title: dolichos pseudocomplanatus
intro: Dolichos pseudocomplanatus, also known as the horse gram or kollu, is a type of legume native to India and other parts of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and cholesterol. The health benefits of consuming dolichos pseudocomplanatus include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving digestion, and supporting kidney function. In herbal preparations, the seeds of the plant are often dried and ground into a powder, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or added to food products.
